'''鈭歡-k-s''' ('''kagakas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zot|zot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zot|zot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-k-s
|-
! Lemma
| kagakas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigakas|thigakas]] || [[word:jigakas|jigakas]] || [[word:shigakas|shigakas]] || [[word:kigakas|kigakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugakas|thuthugakas]] || [[word:jujugakas|jujugakas]] || [[word:shushugakas|shushugakas]] || [[word:kukugakas|kukugakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugakas|thugakas]] || [[word:jugakas|jugakas]] || [[word:shugakas|shugakas]] || [[word:kugakas|kugakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugakas|thugakas]] || [[word:jugakas|jugakas]] || [[word:shugakas|shugakas]] || [[word:kugakas|kugakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegakas|thegakas]] || [[word:jegakas|jegakas]] || [[word:shegakas|shegakas]] || [[word:kegakas|kegakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogakas|thothogakas]] || [[word:jojogakas|jojogakas]] || [[word:shoshogakas|shoshogakas]] || [[word:kokogakas|kokogakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogakas|thogakas]] || [[word:jogakas|jogakas]] || [[word:shogakas|shogakas]] || [[word:kogakas|kogakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogakas|thogakas]] || [[word:jogakas|jogakas]] || [[word:shogakas|shogakas]] || [[word:kogakas|kogakas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]] || [[word:gakas|gakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gakas|th忙gakas]] || [[word:j忙gakas|j忙gakas]] || [[word:sh忙gakas|sh忙gakas]] || [[word:k忙gakas|k忙gakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagakas|thathagakas]] || [[word:jajagakas|jajagakas]] || [[word:shashagakas|shashagakas]] || [[word:kakagakas|kakagakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagakas|thagakas]] || [[word:jagakas|jagakas]] || [[word:shagakas|shagakas]] || [[word:kagakas|kagakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagakas|thagakas]] || [[word:jagakas|jagakas]] || [[word:shagakas|shagakas]] || [[word:kagakas|kagakas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagakas|shagakas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagakas|goshagakas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagakas|gokishagakas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagakasn眉|shagakasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagakasnkn眉|goshagakasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakasn眉|gokishagakasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagakassh毛|shagakassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagakasnksh毛|goshagakasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagakassh毛|gokishagakassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakasro|shagakasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakasnkro|goshagakasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakasro|gokishagakasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakasmu|shagakasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakasnkmu|goshagakasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakasmu|gokishagakasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagakassher|shagakassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagakasnksher|goshagakasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagakassher|gokishagakassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagakasng|shagakasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagakasnkng|goshagakasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagakasng|gokishagakasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagakasya|shagakasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagakasnkya|goshagakasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagakasya|gokishagakasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagakasyam|shagakasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagakasnkyam|goshagakasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagakasyam|gokishagakasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagakasn眉sh毛|shagakasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagakasnkn眉sh毛|goshagakasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagakasn眉sh毛|gokishagakasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakasn眉ro|shagakasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakasnkn眉ro|goshagakasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakasn眉ro|gokishagakasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakasn眉mu|shagakasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakasnkn眉mu|goshagakasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakasn眉mu|gokishagakasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagakassh毛n眉|shagakassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagakasnksh毛n眉|goshagakasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakassh毛n眉|gokishagakassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakassh毛ro|shagakassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakasnksh毛ro|goshagakasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakassh毛ro|gokishagakassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakassh毛mu|shagakassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakasnksh毛mu|goshagakasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakassh毛mu|gokishagakassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagakasron眉|shagakasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagakasnkron眉|goshagakasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakasron眉|gokishagakasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagakasrosh毛|shagakasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagakasnkrosh毛|goshagakasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagakasrosh毛|gokishagakasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakasromu|shagakasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakasnkromu|goshagakasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakasromu|gokishagakasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagakasmun眉|shagakasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagakasnkmun眉|goshagakasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakasmun眉|gokishagakasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagakasmush毛|shagakasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagakasnkmush毛|goshagakasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagakasmush毛|gokishagakasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakasmuro|shagakasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakasnkmuro|goshagakasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakasmuro|gokishagakasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
